layout.core_structure: Mobile-first. Use CSS Grid for the 6x6 map. Leaderboard and spectator feed slide out or stack on mobile, side-by-side on desktop.
layout.spacing_scale: p-2, p-4, p-6. Generous spacing between sections, very tight spacing inside the 6x6 grid.

game_grid.wrapper: grid grid-cols-6 gap-1 md:gap-2 w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto aspect-square p-2 bg-[#0F0F15] rounded-xl border border-white/5
game_grid.cell_base: aspect-square rounded-md md:rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-xs md:text-sm font-bold transition-all cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden

duel_screen.container: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-xl p-4
duel_screen.timer: text-7xl md:text-9xl font-black tabular-nums tracking-tighter animate-pulse text-white
duel_screen.question_card: w-full max-w-2xl bg-[#0F0F15] border border-white/10 p-6 md:p-12 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl mt-8
duel_screen.answer_button: w-full p-4 rounded-xl text-lg font-bold bg-[#1A1A24] border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/30 transition-all text-right

power_ups_bar.container: flex gap-3 bg-[#0F0F15]/80 backdrop-blur-md p-3 rounded-2xl border border-white/10
power_ups_bar.icon_button: w-12 h-12 rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/15 text-white/70 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg text-[10px] gap-1

dashboard_host.layout: Control center grid. 'Swiss & High-Contrast' functional layout using dark gray cards. Real-time controls for starting game, kicking players, and triggering sudden death.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states scale up by 1.05. Active states scale down to 0.95.

animations.pulse_glow: animate-pulse for active territory being challenged.

guidelines_for_agent: 1. RTL Layout is CRITICAL. The entire app MUST use dir='rtl' in HTML tag. Use logical properties like 'ms-' instead of 'ml-', 'pe-' instead of 'pr-'.
2. Language: The UI copy must be completely in Arabic. Avoid LTR English text.
3. Typography: Add Google Fonts link in index.html for 'Cairo' (headings) and 'Tajawal' (body text). Configure them in tailwind.config.js.
4. Component Logic: Use raw Tailwind for the main 6x6 grid and duel overlay. Use Shadcn UI for standard forms, dialogs, and setup screens.
5. Testing: Ensure every button, grid cell, and input has a unique `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid='cell-0-0'`, `data-testid='powerup-skip'`).
6. Styling: No pure black backgrounds for cards; use dark grays (#0F0F15) with subtle 1px white/10 borders to create depth.
7. Grid Interaction: The 6x6 grid must fit entirely within the viewport height to avoid scrolling during intense gameplay. Use aspect-square and max-h-[60vh] logic.
